response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with deep technical breadth (web, mobile, embedded, DLang, TypeScript) and a clear passion for testing, TDD, and developer education through workshops. However, the role requires a Software Engineering Manager with 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership in developer tools/build systems for a mobile platform ecosystem. The resume shows no people-management experience, no formal team leadership titles, and limited dedicated developer-tooling-as-a-product work. Mobile platform ecosystem exposure is minimal (one Apple TV/iOS app years ago).
strengths: Strong testing and TDD background, with workshops on Selenium, TDD, and developer education
Broad full-stack and polyglot experience including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source platform (GISCollective), demonstrating ownership and long-term technical vision
concerns: No demonstrated people management or formal team leadership experience (0 of required 2 years)
Limited dedicated developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure product work (under the 3-year minimum)
Minimal mobile platform ecosystem experience relevant to the role's focus

key_factors.factor: Strong testing/TDD and developer education track record
